zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Beaupré於1339年出生在英國英格蘭韋斯特 素可阿生頓時，她的父親Ralph de Beaupre70歲，母親Margaret Sergeaux64歲。她與John de Longland結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1380年享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: Beaupré
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Colette, Laurier, Treffle, Adelard, Alphonse, Dany, Fernand, Germaine, Gilles, Henri.

French (Beaupré): habitational name from (Le) Beaupré or (Le) Beau Pré, names of several places in various parts of France, or a topographic name from beau pré ‘beautiful meadow’, apparently related to the site of an estate or property.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Beaupré was born in 1339, in Ashington, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph de Beaupre, was 70 and her mother, Margaret Sergeaux, was 64. She married John de Longland. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died about 1380, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Beaupré est née en 1339, à Ashington, West Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de Beaupre, avait 70 ans et sa mère, Margaret Sergeaux, avait 64 ans. Elle a épousé John de Longland. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1380, à l’âge de 42 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Beaupré(이)가 1339년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 애신그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph de Beaupre(은)는 70세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Sergeaux(은)는 64세였다. 그녀는 John de Longland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1380년 42세의 나이로 사망했다.
